name: Kyūden Kakita
text: Reaction: After a duel resolves, bow this stronghold and choose a character you control which was involved in the duel – honor that character.

name: Market of Kaze-no-Kami
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a character that is not honored – bow that character.

name: Support of the Crane
text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on  clan cards.

name: Iwasaki Pupil
text: Each player draws 2 fewer cards from honor bids during the draw phase (to a minimum of 1).

name: Beloved Advisor
text: Action: Choose an opponent – you and that opponent each draw 1 card.

name: Kakita Favorite
text: The character gets +2[pol] while it is involved in a duel.

name: Maker of Keepsakes
text: This character cannot receive dishonored status tokens.

name: Kakita Yuri
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [pol] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice – resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's loser cannot declare [mil] conflicts this phase.

name: Asahina Takamori
text: Reaction: After you play a  character, choose an opponent's character with equal or lower printed cost – that character cannot be declared as an attacker or defender this round.

name: Benevolent Host
text: Reaction: After you play this character, choose a Courtier in your provinces – put that character into play. If that character has a printed cost of 2 or lower, put 1 fate on it.

name: Daidoji Uji
text: While this character is honored, you may play each character in your provinces as if it were in your hand.

name: Winter Court Hosts
text:
No attachments.
Action: After your opponent plays a card during a conflict in which this character is participating, if you are more honorable than that opponent – draw 1 card. (Unlimited.)

name: Distinguished Dōjō
text: Reaction: After you win a duel – place 1 honor token on this holding. Then, you may sacrifice this holding to gain honor equal to the number of honor tokens on this holding. (Limit 3 times per round.)

name: Yasuki Fuzake
text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose up to one character controlled by each player – discard each status token from each of those characters.

name: Kitsuki Jusai
text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed, if your honor bid is equal to an opponent's – move 1 fate from that opponent's fate pool to an unclaimed ring.

name: Akodo Makoto
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating Courtier character – if that character has no fate on it, discard it. Otherwise, remove 1 fate from it.

name: Chukan Nobue
text: Card abilities triggered by your opponents cannot cause cards to be discarded from your hand.

name: Bayushi Dairu
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a status token on another character in play – move that token to this character.

name: Armament Artisan
text: Reaction: After another character you control is honored – honor this character.

name: Political Sanction
text:
Play only during a [pol] conflict in which you count more current [pol] skill than your opponent, and only on a participating character.
Attached character cannot trigger its abilities.

name: Letter of the Daimyō
text:
Attach to a character you control.
Restricted.
Reaction: After attached character wins a [pol] conflict, sacrifice this attachment – your opponent chooses and discards 2 cards from his or her hand.

name: Gossip
text:
Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.)
Action: Name a card. Until the end of the phase, each opponent cannot play cards from his or her hand with that name.

name: The Spear Rushes Forth
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, discard an honored status token from a participating (friendly) character and choose a participating character your opponent controls – bow that character.

name: Courteous Scheming
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict, initiate a [pol] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice – resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner may declare an additional [pol] conflict this phase. (Max 1 per round.)

name: Festival for the Fortunes
text: Action: Honor each character.

name: Shinjo Haruko
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an honored character – move that character to the conflict.

name: Daimyō's Gunbai
text:
Restricted.
Action: During a conflict, if this card is in your hand, reveal it and initiate a [mil] duel against a character your opponent controls of his or her choice — resolve the duel. Put this card into play attached to the duel's winner, if able. Otherwise, discard it.

name: Retreat
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a participating character you control – move that character home.
